get.description:
> ❗️ End of Support Notification
> 
> As of December 5, 2025, this API is now deprecated. For more information, see [OneTrust API Sunsetting & Deprecation Guidelines](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/onetrust-api-sunsetting-deprecation-guidelines).


Use this API to retrieve a list of all courses with basic course details.

> 🗒 Things to Know
>
> - The `searchText` query parameter can be used to search for courses by title based on keywords. For example, `searchText=privacy` or `searchText=data%20protection`.

parameters.name: searchText
parameters.description: The field to search for a particular course.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results list (0….N).

429.description:
Too Many Requests
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

Retry-After.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.

ot-ratelimit-event-id.description: The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.

ot-requests-allowed.description: The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

ot-period.description: The unit of time for which the rate limit applies.

ot-request-made.description: The number of requests made within the specified period.

post.description:
> ❗️ End of Support Notification
> 
> As of December 5, 2025, this API is now deprecated. For more information, see [OneTrust API Sunsetting & Deprecation Guidelines](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/onetrust-api-sunsetting-deprecation-guidelines).


Use this API to enroll users into a specific course. 

> 🗒 Things to Know
>
> - Any number of users can be enrolled into the specified course per each API call.

202.description: Enroll users request has been accepted.

get.description:
> ❗️ End of Support Notification
> 
> As of December 5, 2025, this API is now deprecated. For more information, see [OneTrust API Sunsetting & Deprecation Guidelines](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/onetrust-api-sunsetting-deprecation-guidelines).


Use this API to retrieve the enrollment status of a user using the `enrollmentAssigneeId` query parameter.

parameters.name: enrollmentAssigneeId
parameters.description: ID which gets created when the user is enrolled to a course. The `enrollmentAssigneeId` can be retrieved by calling the [Get Enrollment Details](/onetrust/reference/getenrollmentdetailsusingpost) API.

429.description:
Too Many Requests
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

Retry-After.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.

ot-ratelimit-event-id.description: The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.

ot-requests-allowed.description: The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

ot-period.description: The unit of time for which the rate limit applies.

ot-request-made.description: The number of requests made within the specified period.

delete.description:
> ❗️ End of Support Notification
> 
> As of December 5, 2025, this API is now deprecated. For more information, see [OneTrust API Sunsetting & Deprecation Guidelines](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/onetrust-api-sunsetting-deprecation-guidelines).


Use this API to unenroll a user from a specific course using the `enrollmentAssigneeId`.

parameters.name: enrollmentAssigneeId
parameters.description: ID which gets created when the user is enrolled to a course. The `enrollmentAssigneeId` can be retrieved by calling the [Get Enrollment Details](/onetrust/reference/getenrollmentdetailsusingpost) API.

post.description:
> ❗️ End of Support Notification > > As of December 5, 2025, this API is now deprecated. For more information, see [OneTrust API Sunsetting & Deprecation Guidelines](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/onetrust-api-sunsetting-deprecation-guidelines). Use this API to retrieve enrollment records for all courses. > 🗒 Things to Know > > The following are examples of available filters that can be applied: > >
> > Available Filters > > #### Organization: > > [{"field":"organization","operator":"=","value":”00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"}] > > #### Assignee ID: > > \[{"field":"assigneeId","operator":"=","value":["00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"]}] > \[{"field":"assigneeId","operator":"=","value":["00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001","00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002"]}] > > #### Assigned Date: > > [{"field":"assignedDate","operator":"BW","value":"yyyy-mm-ddT00:00:00.000Z","toValue":"yyyy-mm-ddT00:00:00.000Z"}] > > #### Status: > > \[{"field":"status","operator":"=","value":["NOT_STARTED"]}] > \[{"field":"status","operator":"=","value":["NOT_STARTED","COMPLETED"]}] > Available status values: ["NOT_STARTED","IN_PROGRESS","INCOMPLETE","COMPLETED"] > > #### Score: > > [{"field":"score","operator":"BW","value":"00","toValue":"100"}] > > #### Language ID: > > \[{"field":"languageId","operator":"=","value":["00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"]}] > > #### Deadline: > > [{"field":"deadline","operator":"BW","value":"yyyy-mm-ddT00:00:00.000Z","toValue":"yyyy-mm-ddT00:00:00.000Z"}] > > #### Completed Date: > > [{"field":"completedDate","operator":"BW","value":"yyyy-mm-ddT00:00:00.000Z","toValue":"yyyy-mm-ddT00:00:00.000Z"}] > > #### Course ID: > > \[{"field":"courseId","operator":"=","value":["00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"]}] > > #### Multiple Filters: > > \[ {"field":"courseId","operator":"=","value":["00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000"],"additionalInformation":null}, > {"field":"status","operator":"=","value":["NOT_STARTED"],"additionalInformation":null} ] > >

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number of the results list (0…N).

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of elements to be returned in a page. The maximum is 2000, if you exceed 2000 then 2000 is used by default.

429.description:
Too Many Requests
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

Retry-After.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.

ot-ratelimit-event-id.description: The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.

ot-requests-allowed.description: The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

ot-period.description: The unit of time for which the rate limit applies.

ot-request-made.description: The number of requests made within the specified period.

scopes.TRAINING_READ: Scope used to perform READ operation in Training Module
scopes.TRAINING: Scope used for both READ and WRITE operation in Training Module

id.description: Valid unique id assigned to each course.

name.description: Valid unique name assigned to each course.

nameKey.description: Valid unique nameKey assigned to each course name.

descriptionKey.description: Valid unique nameKey assigned to the course description.

courseActive.description: The flag to get the status of the course. The value will be false if no users are enrolled to the course.

CourseSupportedLanguageInfo.description: Basic details of the languages supported by the course.
CourseSupportedLanguageInfo.title: CourseSupportedLanguageInfo

id.description: Valid unique id assigned to each language.

name.description: Valid unique name assigned to each language.

nameKey.description: Valid unique nameKey assigned to each language.

courseVersion.description: Valid course version available for the language.

version.description: Number of times the sql db gets updated.

languageIds.description: Valid unique id assigned to each language.

languageKeys.description: Valid unique nameKey assigned to each language.

first.description: Flag to check if the result page is the first page.

last.description: Flag to check if the result page is the last page.

size.description: Number of records in each page.

totalElements.description: Total number of elements in a page.

totalPages.description: Total number of pages in the result.

courseId.description: ID assigned to each course. The value is obtained from [Get List of Courses](/onetrust/reference/listofcoursesusingget) API.

deadline.description: The date and time at which the course should be completed. The format is YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.FFFZ

defaultLanguageId.description: Valid unique id assigned to each language. The value is obtained from [Get List of Courses](/onetrust/reference/listofcoursesusingget) API.

defaultLanguageKey.description: Valid unique nameKey assigned to each language.

defaultLanguageName.description: Valid unique name assigned to each language.

courseLanguageVersion.description: Version of the course for particular language.

comments.description: Comments added if any while enrolling the users to the course.

users.description: Valid unique id assigned to each user.

numberOfDays.description: The number of days as a reminder for course deadline.

type.description: The reminder type for course deadline.

UserDTO.description: Used to set Course deadline reminder.

id.description: Valid unique id assigned to each user.

UserDTO.title: UserDTO

languageId.description: Valid unique id for a particular language.

languageName.description: Valid Language available for the course.

languageNameKey.description: Valid Language key for the course.

courseId.description: Valid unique id for the course which user is assigned.

score.description: Score for the course which user is assigned.

completedDT.description: Completion Date for the course (If user is in COMPLETED status).

SearchCriteriaRequest.description: This is a map of the field name and the field value.
SearchCriteriaRequest.title: SearchCriteriaRequest

field.description:
The field value to filter the results.
Available field Values:
  organization, assigneeId, assignedDate, status, score, languageId, deadline, completedDate, courseId

operator.description: The search operator for the filter.

value.description: The search value to filter the results.

empty.description: The flag to check if a result list is empty or not.

first.description: The flag to check if the page is the first page or not.

last.description: the flag to check if the page is the last page or not.

number.description: A number to show the total in the list.

numberOfElements.description: Number of total elements returned in the API.

totalElements.description: Total elements in the return list.

totalPages.description: Total pages returned in the list.

pageNumber.description: Page number of the results list (0….N).

paged.description: The flag to determine if the list is paged. If set True, the list is paged.

unpaged.description: The flag to determine if the list is not paged. If set True, the list is not paged.

empty.description: The flag to determine if the list is empty.

sorted.description: The flag to determine if the list is sorted. If set True, the list is sorted.

unsorted.description: The flag to determine if the list is unsorted. If set True, the list is unsorted.

assignedDate.description: The date and time at which the course was assigned. The format is YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.FFFZ

deadline.description: The date and time at which the course should be completed. The format is YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.FFFZ

completedDate.description: The date and time at which user completes the course. The format is YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.FFFZ

enrollmentAssigneeId.description: ID which gets created when the user is enrolled to a course.

courseVersion.description: Valid course version to which the user has been enrolled.

enrollmentId.description: ID which gets created when the user is enrolled to a course.
